description: App commands the settings (`settings`) webview is allowed to invoke: persisting settings, the password-manager preset, the AI availability / semantic-index controls, the Accessibility prompt, the updater check, the CLI installer, and the shared read-only stores (settings / permissions / capabilities / last hotkey failure). It deliberately omits every palette action command (search, paste/copy/delete/pin, preview, the AI action inspector) so a compromised settings webview cannot drive clipboard side effects.
